scripts.lint: eslint eslint.config.js vite.config.ts verify-versions.js verify-command-contract.js verify-model-contract.js verify-provider-registry-contract.js verify-single-instance-contract.js verify-platform-smoke.js src && prettier --check '.github/**/*.{yml,yaml}' '*.{json,md,js,ts}' 'src/**/*.{ts,svelte,css}' src-tauri/tauri.conf.json src-tauri/capabilities/default.json
scripts.verify:contracts: node verify-command-contract.js && node verify-model-contract.js && node verify-provider-registry-contract.js && node verify-single-instance-contract.js && node verify-platform-smoke.js
scripts.verify:frontend: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
scripts.verify:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm verify:versions && corepack pnpm verify:contracts && corepack pnpm verify:frontend && corepack pnpm verify:rust
